svg.title: Demo B1: Explicit gateway — clean arrow routing, no overlaps
svg.desc: POST label moved below docker host boundary. All other arrows unchanged.
svg.text: Demo B1 · Explicit gateway with content rules — what the code does
Two containers in Docker Compose. The app calls the gateway. The gateway checks rules, then forwards to OpenAI.
Docker host · one compose.yml, two services
• receives frame for normal rule flow
any HTTP client on the host
